remarks2:
Terms & Conditions 

1) All ordered goods are for U.K. market. All electronic components/parts used must have CE/EMC/GS/TUV approved. Test reports/approval certs to be submitted to us.
2) All goods must be in our provided artwork. Please send artwork draft for approval before printing. Do not start printing until the draft is approved.
3) 2 sets of shipment samples are required and to be sent to us one week before shipment by prepaid courier. Do not arrange loading until the shipment sample is approved.
4) A completed Product Check Form must be sent for approval before inspection. Do not arrange loading until the Product Check Form is approved.
5.1) We will bear the inspection cost for the first inspection. If the first inspection is failed, supplier will need to pay for the re-inspection - USD200 for MTL QC cost or actual cost by Inspection Company.
5.2) If supplier would like to re-schedule the inspection, please provide written notice before 2 working days of the execution date OR cancellation fee USD200 (or the actual cost by any inspection company) will be charge. 
6) All goods must be packed into strong export carton with required shipping marks and side marks clearly printed. If inner box is required must have item number and inner box quantity mentioned on the box. There must be cut protective cardboard at the opening of the export carton.
7) The gross weight of export carton must not exceed 22kgs. Please inform us immediately if G.W. exceeds 22kgs for required quantities for export carton so we can adjust the packing accordingly. If goods are shipped with G.W. over 22kgs, the repacking charges in the warehouse to be borne by supplier.
8) FCR or original copy of B/L must be shown with below details:

Shipper :	&shiper_name&
                  TOWER B, 29TH FLOOR, CAPITAL TOWER,
                  38 WAI YIP STREET, KOWLOON BAY, 
                  KOWLOON, HONG KONG

Consignee :	B&M RETAIL LIMITED
                  THE VAULT,DAKOTA DRIVE,            	
                  ESTUARY COMMERCE PARK,SPEKE,
                  LIVERPOOL
                  L24 8RJ                                  
                  UNITED KINGDOM                                                       

Notify Party :  	same as consignee

You may send specimen B/L to us for checking.

9) GSP China FORM A if required the consignee must be:
B&M RETAIL LIMITED
THE VAULT,DAKOTA DRIVE, ESTUARY COMMERCE PARK,SPEKE, LIVERPOOL, L24 8RJ, UNITED KINGDOM         
                                              
10) Please check the CBM mentioned on order carefully. Inform us if any data incorrect. Any quantity problem caused by the CBM difference after order confirmation, the extra freight charges will be on supplier's account.
11) All polybags used for packing purpose must have hole punched and must have WARNING clearly printed "Warning : Danger of Suffocation - Keep Away from Children. Dispose of Safely. "
12) Send all appropriate/needed product label for approval. Do not start printing until it is approved.
13) Late shipment is not acceptable. Any shipment delay more than 5 days, 5% of PO amount as penalty will be charged; if further delay to 14 days, air freight might be charged to the supplier.
14) Supplier has to guarantee that the products have not been produced with Russian steel or Iron, all raw materials & production processing operation are not related to Russia. Supplier may need to provide proof documents on request, failure to this will cause a claim/recall.

remarks2:
Terms & Conditions :
1) All goods are for HONG KONG market & fulfilled its quality standard . All electronic components/parts used must have CE/EMC/GS/RoHS approved & marking. Test reports/approval certs to be submitted to us.
2) All goods must be in our approved artwork (including product label). Please send the draft for approval before printing. Do not start printing until the draft is approved.
3) 2 sets of shipment sample are required and to be sent to us 10 days before shipment by freight prepaid. Do not arrange loading until the shipment sample is approved.
4) A completed Product Check Form must be sent for approval before inspection. Do not arrange loading until the Product Check Form is approved. Loading pic has to be provided immediately after loading.
5.1) We will bear the inspection fee for the first inspection (by Inspection company or Multi Lines QC). But if the inspection is failed, supplier will need to pay for the re-inspection : USD200 to MTL or actual cost by Inspection company (decision to be made by MTL).
5.2) If supplier would like to re-schedule the inspection, please provide written notice 2 working days prior to inspection date OR cancellation fee USD200 (or the actuall cost by the Inspection company) will be charged.
6) All goods must be packed into strong export carton with shipping marks and side marks clearly printed. If inner box is required must have item number and inner box quantity mentioned on the box. To prevent damage to stock when opening the carton, please place card inserts on top of the packed items along the length of the carton.
7) The G.W. of export carton should not exceed 22kgs in general. Please check with us immediately if pack size is changed.
8) Original copy of Forwarder Cargo Receipt (FCR) or telex-released/surrendered Bill of Lading be shown with below details :

Shipper : << FACTORY >>

Consignee : MULTI PRODUCTS (HK) LIMITED
                  UNIT 813-814, 8/F.,
                  HOPE SEA INDUSTRIAL CENTRE,
                  26 LAM HING STREET, KOWLOON BAY,
                  HONG KONG
   
Notify Party : MULTI PRODUCTS (HK) LIMITED
                   29/F., TOWER B, CAPITAL TOWER,
                   38 WAI YIP STREET,
                   KOWLOON BAY, HONG KONG

9) GSP Form A is required for goods from India, Vietnam, etc. (details please check with our Merchandiser).    
10) Please check the CBM on PO carefully. Inform us immediately if any data incorrect. Any problems caused by the wrong CBM info from supplier, the extra freight charges will be on supplier's account.
11) All Printed Bags or Polybags have opening more than 180mm must be punched Anti-Suffocation holes (size D. 6mm) and with WARNING in English & Chinese clearly mentioned :- WARNING: to avoid danger of suffocation keep this bag away from children. 
12) Late shipment is not acceptable. Any shipment delay more than 5 days, 5% penalty of PO amount will be charged; if further delay to 14 days, air freight might be charged to supplier.
13) If you need to amend shipping bookings placed with forwarder, you MUST do this with a minimum of 14 days prior to booked ETD. Failure to do so with incur a penalty of USD400.00 (per order per cancellation).
